/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/cc  -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX13.1.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=12.7 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/local/lib CMakeFiles/sgemm_bench.dir/main.c.o CMakeFiles/sgemm_bench.dir/interface.c.o CMakeFiles/sgemm_bench.dir/time.c.o CMakeFiles/sgemm_bench.dir/sgemm.c.o -o sgemm_bench  /opt/local/lib/libopenblas.dylib
